{{CargoOrgan
|name=Life-Stealing Gauntlet
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10960
|idx=153
|description=Based on Star-Sucking Technique principles. Modularized with electronic augmentation to match - nay, surpass - the original art. Flagship product of cyborg prosthetics!
|skill=
|hp=1590
|def=232
|atk=244
|rush=209
|gene1=Per Hitman intercepted, {race} ATK +7
Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|gene2=prop@69294_2
|gene3=Per Hitman intercepted, {race} DEF +7
Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|gene4={race} Fire RES +1.5%
|gene5=Against Daily Hitmen, DMG +9%
|gene7=Against Daily Hitmen, DMG +9% (Awakened)
|}}
